ogTitle: Riverslea vs Robertsons Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Riverslea and Robertsons Beach.
heading: Riverslea vs Robertsons Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Riverslea, Victoria and Robertsons Beach, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Robertsons Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Riverslea (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Riverslea or Robertsons Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Riverslea has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Robertsons Beach scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Riverslea scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Robertsons Beach scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Riverslea or Robertsons Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Robertsons Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
